directive.title: Foundation data layer with Neon DB and core schema

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation with the database schema, type definitions, error handling, and audit query module. However, it is critically incomplete — missing all API route handlers (api/rfqs/route.ts, api/rfqs/[id]/route.ts, api/health/db/route.ts), the RFQ queries module (lib/db/queries/rfqs.ts), user/company query modules, seed script, and Drizzle configuration file. The schema has a critical violation where rfq_number is not implemented as a computed column. The code also has buildability issues with require('ws') usage incompatible with Next.js 14. Only 3 of 20 acceptance criteria fully pass, with 2 partial passes. The build cannot be shipped in its current state.

top_issues.description: rfq_number column is defined as a regular text column with unique constraint, but the specification requires it to be a GENERATED ALWAYS AS computed column using the expression: 'RFQ-'||to_char(created_at,'YYYYMMDD')||'-'||substring(id::text,1,6). This is a critical schema violation that breaks the RFQ numbering system.

API route files for RFQ CRUD operations (api/rfqs/route.ts, api/rfqs/[id]/route.ts, api/health/db/route.ts) are missing from the generated code. These are required for acceptance criteria 5-12, 14-15.
Health check module (lib/db/health.ts) is missing from generated code. Required for acceptance criteria 10-11.
